subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast heard the Call! The cry of the Concourse on High hath been raised: "Glorified be my Lord, the All-Glorious!" Radiant hath become the countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمع الندآء قد ارتفع ضجیج الملاء الاعلی سبحان ربی الابهی قد تهلل وجه
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the concourse on high
